prompt_text:
### Demographics: 52-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 105.9 kg; Height 184.5 cm; BMI 31.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 137/86 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.9%; 9 months ago 9.7%; 6 months ago 9.9%; 3 months ago 9.4%; current 8.8%), FPG (12 months ago 249mg/dL; 9 months ago 209mg/dL; 6 months ago 283mg/dL; 3 months ago 231mg/dL; current 214mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 104.9kg; 9 months ago 106.2kg; 6 months ago 106.3kg; 3 months ago 106.3kg; current 105.9kg), Height (12 months ago 184.5cm; 9 months ago 184.5cm; 6 months ago 184.5cm; 3 months ago 184.5cm; current 184.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 31.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 136mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 134mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 137mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 90mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 90mmHg; 3 months ago 88mmHg; current 86mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 17U/L), AST (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 24U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 53mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 45mg/g; 9 months ago 51mg/g; 6 months ago 52mg/g; 3 months ago 73mg/g; current 70mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 67mg/dL; 9 months ago 74mg/dL; 6 months ago 66mg/dL; 3 months ago 67mg/dL; current 70mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 124mg/dL; 9 months ago 127mg/dL; 6 months ago 112mg/dL; 3 months ago 126mg/dL; current 118mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
